examples: But she is really not so beauty, loveliness, and winningness, that I showed before, as the lotus and the countryside flowers are!
Momotea: why is the music so winningness because it runs mountains high like the sea sometimes but sometimes it is peaceful like a rill.
I like the wayside floret. but she is really not so beauty loveliness and winningness that I showed before as the lotus and the countryside flowers are!
